form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 6th in a OPEN on April 1 over 510m at this track behind Wyndra All Smoke beaten 9 lengths (30.43). Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by 5.5 lengths in a Free For All last start at Q Parklands, recording a dynamic 29.66 over the 520m journey. Top win and looms as a strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.98) when fourth over 520m at Q Parklands in a Grade 5. Has a win and two places from three starts from this draw. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 407m. Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Moet Magic beaten 0.8 lengths (25.55). Close to the speed and boxed on well at his latest run. In the mix again.
